scripts.test:prepare: yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:tauri && yarn build --no-bundle
scripts.dev:tauri:fast:darwin: node ./scripts/build-extensions-if-needed.mjs && node ./scripts/build-web-if-needed.mjs && yarn download:bin && make download-llamacpp-backend-if-exists && make build-mlx-server-if-exists && make build-foundation-models-server-if-exists && ([ -x src-tauri/resources/bin/jan-cli ] || make build-cli-dev) && tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.conf.json
scripts.dev:tauri:full: yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:tauri && run-script-os dev:tauri:full
scripts.dev:tauri:clean: yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:tauri && cross-env IS_CLEAN=true run-script-os dev:tauri:full
scripts.dev:tauri:full:darwin: node ./scripts/build-web-if-needed.mjs && yarn download:bin && make download-llamacpp-backend && tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.conf.json
scripts.dev:ios: yarn copy:assets:mobile && RUSTC_WRAPPER= cross-env IS_IOS=true yarn tauri ios dev --features mobile
scripts.dev:android: yarn copy:assets:mobile && cross-env IS_ANDROID=true yarn tauri android dev --features mobile
scripts.build:android: yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:mobile && cross-env IS_CLEAN=true yarn tauri android build -- --no-default-features --features mobile
scripts.build:ios: yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:mobile && cross-env IS_IOS=true yarn tauri ios build -- --no-default-features --features mobile
scripts.build:ios:device: yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:mobile && cross-env IS_IOS=true yarn tauri ios build -- --no-default-features --features mobile --export-method debugging
scripts.build:jan-cli:debug: cd src-tauri && cargo build --features cli --bin jan-cli
scripts.build:tauri:darwin:debug: yarn download:bin && make download-llamacpp-backend && yarn build:mlx-server && yarn build:foundation-models-server && yarn build:jan-cli:debug && yarn build:web && yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:tauri && yarn tauri build --debug
scripts.build:tauri:win32: yarn download:bin && yarn build:cli && yarn tauri build
scripts.build:tauri:linux: yarn download:bin && yarn build:cli && NO_STRIP=1 ./src-tauri/build-utils/shim-linuxdeploy.sh yarn tauri build && ./src-tauri/build-utils/buildAppImage.sh
scripts.build:tauri:darwin: yarn download:bin && make download-llamacpp-backend && yarn build:mlx-server && yarn build:foundation-models-server && yarn build:cli && yarn tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin
scripts.build:tauri:darwin:native: node ./scripts/build-extensions-if-needed.mjs && node ./scripts/build-web-if-needed.mjs && yarn build:icon && yarn copy:assets:tauri && yarn download:bin && make download-llamacpp-backend && make build-mlx-server-if-exists && make build-foundation-models-server-if-exists && cd src-tauri && cargo build --release --features cli --bin jan-cli && cp target/release/jan-cli resources/bin/jan-cli && chmod +x resources/bin/jan-cli && cd .. && yarn tauri build
scripts.build:tauri:plugin:api: cd src-tauri/plugins && yarn install && yarn workspaces foreach -Apt run build
scripts.build:icon: ([ -x .venv-dev/bin/python3 ] && .venv-dev/bin/python3 scripts/build-macos-app-icon.py || python3 scripts/build-macos-app-icon.py) && tauri icon ./src-tauri/icons/icon.png && ([ -x .venv-dev/bin/python3 ] && .venv-dev/bin/python3 scripts/build-macos-app-icon.py || python3 scripts/build-macos-app-icon.py)
scripts.build:core: cd core && yarn build && yarn pack
scripts.build:extensions: rimraf ./pre-install/*.tgz || true && yarn workspace @janhq/core build && cd extensions && yarn install && cd .. && run-script-os
scripts.build:extensions:darwin: cd extensions && yarn workspaces foreach -Apt run build:publish
scripts.build:extensions:win32: cd extensions && yarn workspaces foreach -Apt --exclude @janhq/mlx-extension --exclude @janhq/foundation-models-extension run build:publish
scripts.build:extensions:linux: cd extensions && yarn workspaces foreach -Apt --exclude @janhq/mlx-extension --exclude @janhq/foundation-models-extension run build:publish
